facts_kodyengine_4670599275640000.content: Test tasks for verify-gate improvements use single-file modifications to isolate gate filtering logic from broader task scope.

conventions_kodyengine_4670599280955458.content: Verify-gate validation runs trivial changes through full pipeline to confirm gates differentiate task-modified files from pre-existing errors in unrelated code.

thoughts_kodyengine_4670599288480333.content: Build stage may report pre-existing TS/ESLint errors even if verify-gate is designed to skip them; gate behavior must be validated independently of build output.

facts_kody_4671119810007583.content: Kody 0.3.2 verify-gate allows PRs to progress despite pre-existing TS/ESLint errors in unrelated files—this is intentional design.

conventions_kody_4671119814754458.content: 'live-test' task type validates Kody engine improvements by running actual pipeline tasks with specific constraints.
